query: SELECT e.id, e.nome, e.gestorId FROM equipes e; SELECT u.id, u.name, u.equipeId FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Luis%' OR u.name LIKE '%sheldon%' OR u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%' OR u.name LIKE '%Andrew%' OR u.name LIKE '%Igor%' OR u.name LIKE '%kauanth%' ORDER BY u.name;
